status: height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 28px 0 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); position: relative; z-index: 5;
map-scrim: position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 60px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(11,11,15,0.7), transparent);
pin: position: absolute; width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; background: #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
pin-label: position: absolute; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
grabber: width: 36px; height: 4px; border-radius: 2px; background: var(--divider); margin: 0 auto 14px;
fc-head: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 16px;
fc-route: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 14px;
fc-arc-mini: flex: 1; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--blue), var(--arc-remaining)); position: relative;
fc-g: font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px; font-feature-settings: 'tnum';
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
